## Palette

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--canvas` | | Background |
| `--surface` | | Cards, elevated elements |
| `--text` | | Primary text |
| `--text-muted` | | Secondary text |
| `--accent-primary` | | CTAs, key actions |
| `--accent-secondary` | | Supporting accents |

| Role | Family | Weight | Usage |
